en.akelPasteDescription: AkelPaste is a simple and efficient clipboard manager designed to make your workflow smoother and more productive.
en.autoPasteDescription: Automatically paste content after copying to clipboard with shortcuts
en.autoPasteHelp: When enabled, content will be automatically pasted after being copied by shortcuts
en.emojiIconsDescription: Configure emoji and icon settings for templates
en.emojiHelp: Choose a folder containing custom emoji images to use in your templates
en.dataManagementDescription: Export, import, and manage your template data
en.dataManagementHelp: Export your templates and settings to backup or share with others. Import to restore from a backup.
en.noTemplatesMatchFilters: No templates match the current filters
en.createFirstTemplate: Create your first template to get started
en.createFirstCollectionHint: Create collections to make filtering large template lists faster.
en.manageCollectionsDescription: Create, rename, or remove collections. Removing a collection keeps the templates and simply moves them back to All.
en.title: Title
en.collectionOptionalDescription: Leave this empty if the template should stay in All by default.
en.pinnedTemplateDescription: Pinned templates appear in floating window for quick access
en.appearanceDescription: Choose how AkelPaste looks on your device
en.fillTitleAndContent: Please fill in both title and content
en.customizePinWindowAppearance: Customize the appearance and behavior of the floating pin window
en.displayIconsOnButtons: Display icons on buttons in the pin window
en.allowFloatingResizeDescription: Let the floating window be resized manually. If it becomes shorter than its content, vertical scrolling will appear.
en.chooseButtonPosition: Choose where buttons appear in the pin window
en.customizeTemplateDisplay: Customize how templates are displayed in the home page
en.displayTemplateContentPreview: Display template content preview on cards
en.pinnedTemplatesFloatingWindow: Pinned templates will appear in a separate floating window
en.showPinnedTemplatesFloating: Show pinned templates in a floating window for quick access
en.appearanceSectionDescription: Customize the look and feel of the application
en.templatesSectionDescription: Configure template behavior and floating window settings
en.behaviorSectionDescription: Control how the application behaves during usage
en.titleAndContentRequired: Please fill in both title and content
en.existingCollectionSelected: That collection already exists, so it was selected for this template
en.noCollectionsYet: No collections yet. Create one here or from the template editor.
en.adjustSearchOrCollection: Try changing your search or switching to another collection.
en.deleteCollectionDescription: Templates in this collection will stay, but they will no longer belong to a collection.
en.shortcutAlreadyAssigned: This shortcut is already assigned to this template
en.includeNonModifierKey: Please include at least one non-modifier key (like a letter or number) in your shortcut.
en.noBackupFoundOrRestoreFailed: No backup found or restore failed

zh.akelPasteDescription: AkelPaste 是一个简单高效的剪贴板管理器，旨在让您的工作流程更加顺畅和高效。
zh.autoPasteDescription: 使用快捷键复制到剪贴板后自动粘贴内容
zh.autoPasteHelp: 启用后，通过快捷键复制的内容将自动粘贴
zh.emojiIconsDescription: 配置模板的表情符号和图标设置
zh.customEmojiFolder: 自定义表情符号文件夹
zh.selectEmojiFolder: 选择包含自定义表情符号的文件夹...
zh.emojiHelp: 选择包含自定义表情符号图像的文件夹以在模板中使用
zh.dataManagementDescription: 导出、导入和管理您的模板数据
zh.dataManagementHelp: 导出您的模板和设置以备份或与他人分享。导入以从备份中恢复。
zh.noTemplatesMatchFilters: 没有符合当前筛选条件的模板
zh.createFirstTemplate: 创建您的第一个模板开始使用
zh.createFirstCollectionHint: 创建集合后，筛选大量模板会更快更清晰。
zh.manageCollectionsDescription: 创建、重命名或删除集合。删除集合不会删除模板，只会让它们回到全部列表。
zh.title: 标题
zh.collectionOptionalDescription: 如果不选择集合，模板将默认显示在全部中。
zh.enterTemplateContent: 在此输入您的模板内容...
zh.pinnedTemplateDescription: 固定的模板会出现在浮动窗口中以便快速访问
zh.appearanceDescription: 选择 AkelPaste 在您设备上的外观
zh.customizePinWindowAppearance: 自定义浮动固定窗口的外观和行为
zh.displayIconsOnButtons: 在固定窗口的按钮上显示图标
zh.allowFloatingResize: 允许调整浮动窗口大小
zh.allowFloatingResizeDescription: 允许手动调整浮动窗口大小。如果窗口高度小于内容高度，将显示垂直滚动。
zh.chooseButtonPosition: 选择按钮在固定窗口中的显示位置
zh.customizeTemplateDisplay: 自定义模板在主页中的显示方式
zh.displayTemplateContentPreview: 在卡片上显示模板内容预览
zh.pinnedTemplatesFloatingWindow: 固定的模板将出现在单独的浮动窗口中
zh.showPinnedTemplatesFloating: 在浮动窗口中显示固定模板以便快速访问
zh.settingsDescription: 自定义您的 AkelPaste 体验
zh.appearanceSectionDescription: 自定义应用程序的外观和感觉
zh.templatesSectionDescription: 配置模板行为和浮动窗口设置
zh.behaviorSectionDescription: 控制应用程序在使用过程中的行为
zh.emojiFolderUpdated: 表情文件夹路径已更新
zh.existingCollectionSelected: 该集合已存在，已为此模板直接选中
zh.noCollectionsYet: 还没有集合。您可以在这里或模板编辑器中创建。
zh.adjustSearchOrCollection: 请尝试调整搜索内容，或切换到其他集合。
zh.deleteCollectionDescription: 该集合中的模板会保留，但不再属于任何集合。
zh.shortcutAlreadyAssigned: 此快捷键已分配给此模板
zh.includeNonModifierKey: 请在快捷键中包含至少一个非修饰键（如字母或数字）。
zh.noBackupFoundOrRestoreFailed: 未找到备份或恢复失败
